user.title: Add METAR Station
user.description: Enter an ICAO station identifier (e.g. KORD, EGLL). Data is fetched from the Aviation Weather Center.

reconfigure.title: Change METAR Station
reconfigure.description: Enter a new ICAO station identifier to replace the current one.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Aviation Weather Center API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_station_format: Station ID must be 3-4 uppercase letters or digits (e.g. KORD).
error.station_not_found: No METAR data found for that station ID. Verify the ICAO identifier and try again.
